name: vittasys
description: VittaSys — Sistema de Gestão de Vacinação (Vittalis Saúde)

scripts.db:reset: npx prisma db push --force-reset && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.setup: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.test:setup: dotenv -e .env.test -- npx prisma db push --force-reset && dotenv -e .env.test -- node prisma/seed.js
scripts.deploy: npm run predeploy && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed:prod && npm start
scripts.test:report: npx vitest run tests/unit --reporter=json --outputFile=tests/results.json && node tests/generate-report.js
